features: SUPER ABSORBENT & DRY HAIR FASTER: The microfibre hair towel is made from improved microfiber towel for hair with longer plush. They are more absorbent like magic than other regular hair towel. The hair turbans for wet hair absorb almost 75% of water & cut down your drying time in half or more, but no more heat damage from blow dryer. You will be excited to sit & sip your coffee rather than spend long time blow drying your hair

INCREDIBLY SOFT & LIGHTWEIGHT: The material of hair towel wrap is extra soft and lightweight. It feels thick and fluffy enough to absorb well but still thin enough to flex and twist easily around your head. They're more comfortable, much easier, and lighter than wrapping in a heavy bath towel. You will be pleased how the microfibre hair towel wrap feels

SIZED TO ALL TYPES OF HAIR: Our hair wrap towel after shower is ideal for women, men & kids. In perfect size 10x26inch, it is great for all types of hair, no matter your hair is curly, long, thick, short or thin. The hair turban dries plopping curly hair naturally, so your hair keep bouncy, shiny & soft. You still get the curl with no frizz but free of all damage

BUTTON LOOP AVOIDS FALLING: Our head towels wrap for women are overall amazing, but you may prefer the button on the back that you can wrap the little string around to hold it on. The button is super sturdy and easy to hook its loop. The curly hair towel stays in place as you do your skincare & makeup routine. You will love how the button-loop closure works

EASY TO USE & WASH: You will like how easy the hair towel turban is to use. It is perfect in size & is lightweight, but absorbent. The hair drying towel wrap is ideal for everyday use at home, at the gym & travel because of saving space. The head towel retains its softness & absorbency after 10000 washes, whether machine or hand wash with no special care. You will feel incredible about the durability of our microfiber hair towel
